TopModule.BindInstances: add_ln950_fu_334_p2 faddfsub_32ns_32ns_32_7_full_dsp_1_U1986 add_ln953_fu_374_p2 faddfsub_32ns_32ns_32_7_full_dsp_1_U1987 add_ln962_fu_420_p2 output_buf_U output_buf_1_U output_buf_2_U output_buf_3_U output_buf_4_U output_buf_5_U output_buf_6_U output_buf_7_U output_buf_8_U output_buf_9_U p_ZZ42bert_ffn_down_norm_feedback_12layer_kernelE10output_buf_10_U p_ZZ42bert_ffn_down_norm_feedback_12layer_kernelE10output_buf_11_U p_ZZ42bert_ffn_down_norm_feedback_12layer_kernelE10output_buf_12_U p_ZZ42bert_ffn_down_norm_feedback_12layer_kernelE10output_buf_13_U p_ZZ42bert_ffn_down_norm_feedback_12layer_kernelE10output_buf_14_U p_ZZ42bert_ffn_down_norm_feedback_12layer_kernelE10output_buf_15_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: CTRL, 0x00, 32, RW, Control signals, 0=AP_START 1=AP_DONE 2=AP_IDLE 3=AP_READY 7=AUTO_RESTART 9=INTERRUPT
GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
w2_all_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of w2_all,
w2_all_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of w2_all,
b2_all_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of b2_all,
b2_all_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of b2_all,
final_norm_gamma_all_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_gamma_all,
final_norm_gamma_all_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_gamma_all,
final_norm_beta_all_1, 0x34, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_beta_all,
final_norm_beta_all_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_beta_all,
final_output_hidden_1, 0x40, 32, W, Data signal of final_output_hidden,
final_output_hidden_2, 0x44, 32, W, Data signal of final_output_hidden,

table.keys: Interface, Register Mode, TDATA, TREADY, TVALID

table.column: clock, ap_clk,
reset, ap_rst_n,
interrupt, interrupt,
ap_ctrl_hs, ,
in, stream<ap_uint<512> 0>&
in, stream<ap_uint<512> 0>&
in, ap_uint<512>*

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
